CustomField.description: Copies from the Appraisal Company from the most recent Appraisal with an Appraisal Type of Buyer's Purchase Loan. To update, edit the related Appraisal record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Copies from the Appraisal Company from the most recent Appraisal with an Appraisal Type of Buyer's Purchase Loan. To update, edit the related Appraisal record.
CustomField.label: Appraisal Company
